title: State tree
doc_html:
§160.  State tree

The baldcypress (Taxodium distichum), commonly known as the "cypress" tree, is hereby designated and hereafter shall be known as the official state tree of the state of Louisiana.  

Acts 1963, No. 49.

§160.  State tree
